package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_count_gt_zero_contains: `strings.Count(...) > 0` instead of `strings.Contains(...)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario653Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Contains(haystack, needle)
}
